aiOverview.content: Aesthedent is a name commonly associated with modern dental and cosmetic clinics specializing in advanced smile design, implants, skin care, and facial aesthetics. Multiple prominent clinics and specialists operate under this name globally, offering services ranging from routine dentistry to aesthetic medicine.Because "Aesthedent" refers to several different independent practices, the location or clinic you are looking for likely falls into one of these highly-rated branches:📍 Key Locations & ClinicsIndia - Bhubaneswar, Odisha: A holistic destination for dental, skin, hair, and PMU (Permanent Makeup) treatments. You can view their services and updates on the Aesthedent Bhubaneswar Instagram.India - Pune, Maharashtra: Located in Kothrud, this clinic specializes in precision dental implants, root canals, and bio-harmonious aesthetics. Browse their specialist-only protocols on the Aesthedent Pune Website.Europe: There are also established clinics operating under the Aesthedent name in places like Hamburg, Germany and Plovdiv, Bulgaria.Could you clarify which city or specific treatment (such as dental implants, veneers, or aesthetic medicine) you are looking for?
